XOnlineTeamEnumerateByUserXUID

Enumerates a list of teams that a player belongs to.

HRESULT XOnlineTeamEnumerateByUserXUID(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    XUID xuidUser,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the player requesting the team information.
xuidUser
[in] XUID structure uniquely identifying the player whose team membership should be enumerated.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event.
phTask
[out] Pointer to an XONLINETASK_HANDLE handle returned.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

When the task completes, the title can call the XOnlineTeamEnumerateGetResults function to retrieve the list of team XUID structures and the XOnlineTeamGetDetails function to retrieve details for a particular team.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions
